dependencies.reason: Credential baseline should be corrected before enabling abuse controls and lockout policies.
Token lifecycle migration should not proceed while bootstrap account behavior is insecure.
JWT policy baseline should be stabilized before auth traffic controls.
Runtime hardening should use already-patched dependency stack.
Frontend runtime profile should switch after toolchain CVE remediation.
Session strategy and browser controls depend on final runtime/edge topology.
Cookie/CORS policy should be finalized with known deployment network boundaries.
Path/upload restrictions should align with parser guard implementation.
Error sanitization should be validated alongside parser/dependency changes.

items.title: Default admin credentials and startup password reset
implementation_steps: Remove default/admin credential constants from frontend and docs.
Stop startup password hash overwrite in master admin bootstrap.
Remove master admin default credential overrides from compose defaults.

rollback_risk.notes: Could break demo bootstrap expectations in local/dev.
rollback_risk.rollback_plan: Use temporary bootstrap feature flag for local/dev only while preserving secure production defaults.

isolated_pr.reason: Can be delivered in dedicated frontend/docs and backend bootstrap PRs.

items.title: JWT secret strength and startup fail-fast
implementation_steps: Add strict JWT secret validation for non-local environments.
Enforce startup failure when default/weak secrets are detected.
Document secret rotation procedure.

rollback_risk.notes: May block startup in previously permissive environments.
rollback_risk.rollback_plan: Temporarily run in local/dev mode only for emergency rollback; keep production block intact.

isolated_pr.reason: Pure backend policy change with focused test impact.

batches.name: Dependency CVE Remediation and Upload Guards

items.title: Backend parser dependency and upload hardening
implementation_steps: Upgrade vulnerable backend packages.
Add max upload size checks prior to full parsing.
Add parser failure handling paths with bounded resource behavior.

rollback_risk.notes: Dependency compatibility and parser behavior regressions are possible.
rollback_risk.rollback_plan: Rollback to last known-good dependency lock snapshot and reintroduce upgrades incrementally.

isolated_pr.reason: Can be isolated to backend dependency and parser guard scope.

items.title: Frontend toolchain advisory remediation
implementation_steps: Upgrade Vite/toolchain dependency chain to patched versions.
Regenerate lockfile and verify build behavior.
Run npm audit with target threshold enforcement.
tests_to_add_or_update: npm audit threshold check in CI

rollback_risk.notes: Toolchain major/minor upgrades can impact frontend build output.
rollback_risk.rollback_plan: Pin prior lockfile and re-upgrade with staged package updates.

isolated_pr.reason: Frontend-only dependency update can be isolated from backend behavior.

batches.name: File Path and Error Disclosure Controls

items.title: Restrict path ingestion endpoints
implementation_steps: Disable path-ingestion endpoints in production mode or enforce allowlisted root.
Validate resolved path containment before reads.
Reject out-of-scope absolute and traversal paths.

rollback_risk.notes: May break internal admin seed workflows.
rollback_risk.rollback_plan: Temporary feature flag to retain legacy behavior in controlled internal environments only.

isolated_pr.reason: Contained to hospitality file ingestion flows.

items.title: Sanitize exception details in API responses
implementation_steps: Replace raw exception interpolation in HTTP responses.
Add server-side structured logging for internal error detail.
Introduce consistent error mapping helpers.

rollback_risk.notes: Low functional risk; mostly response shape/message changes.
rollback_risk.rollback_plan: Revert sanitization helper changes if client integrations require temporary compatibility.

isolated_pr.reason: Response handling change can be scoped and independently validated.

batches.name: Production Runtime and Data-Store Exposure Hardening

items.title: Replace dev runtime with production container behavior
implementation_steps: Switch backend runtime to non-reload production command.
Build static frontend and serve from production server image.
Run containers as non-root users and remove source bind mounts in prod profile.

rollback_risk.notes: Deployment profile changes can impact startup, routing, and release behavior.
rollback_risk.rollback_plan: Maintain explicit dev/prod profiles and staged rollout with smoke checks.

isolated_pr.reason: Infra/deployment concern can be isolated in dedicated ops PR with staging verification.

items.title: Secure MongoDB exposure and auth posture
implementation_steps: Remove public MongoDB host port exposure in production profile.
Require authenticated MongoDB URI and least-privilege credentials.
Apply network restrictions and TLS where supported.
tests_to_add_or_update: staging network reachability test (external access denied)
DB auth negative test (unauthenticated access fails)

rollback_risk.notes: DB connectivity misconfiguration can cause service outage.
rollback_risk.rollback_plan: Keep controlled fallback profile for rapid recovery while preserving no-public-access constraint.

batches.name: Auth Abuse Protection and Browser Session Hardening

items.title: Rate limiting and lockout policy for sensitive endpoints
implementation_steps: Add IP and identity-based throttling on login and token-sensitive endpoints.
Implement lockout/backoff policy for repeated failed logins.
Add security event logging for abuse detection.

rollback_risk.notes: Incorrect tuning can block legitimate users.
rollback_risk.rollback_plan: Feature-flag throttling thresholds and rollback to observability-only mode if required.

isolated_pr.reason: Can be delivered as backend-only behavior with focused tests.

items.title: CORS, header policy, and session token strategy
implementation_steps: Restrict CORS to explicit trusted origins.
Apply browser security headers at app/edge.
Migrate to secure cookie session strategy (or enforce temporary hardened bearer model with strict CSP).
tests_to_add_or_update: integration tests for session cookie auth
e2e auth flow tests after token transport change

rollback_risk.notes: Session transport changes can break all authenticated frontend flows.
rollback_risk.rollback_plan: Dual-mode auth (cookie + bearer) behind feature flag during migration window.

isolated_pr.reason: Requires coordinated backend, frontend, and edge rollout to avoid auth downtime.

items.title: Introduce security scanning and merge/deploy gates
implementation_steps: Add SAST, secret scanning, dependency audits, and container scans to CI.
Set fail thresholds for high/critical findings.
Enforce required checks in branch protection and deploy gating.
tests_to_add_or_update: CI pipeline negative test using intentionally vulnerable fixture branch

rollback_risk.notes: Main risk is workflow friction from false positives.
rollback_risk.rollback_plan: Temporary warn mode while tuning policies, then return to blocking mode.

isolated_pr.reason: CI policy and workflow changes can be isolated from app runtime behavior.

items.title: Hash reset/invitation tokens and reduce URL exposure
implementation_steps: Store hashed token values and migrate token lookup logic.
Reduce direct token echoing in APIs/UI.
Validate token redaction in logs and monitoring paths.
tests_to_add_or_update: integration tests for backward-compatible token migration

rollback_risk.notes: Active token links may fail during migration if compatibility is not retained.
rollback_risk.rollback_plan: Temporary dual-lookup support for legacy tokens with short deprecation window.

isolated_pr.reason: Can be isolated if compatibility migration and tests are included in the same PR.

safe_refactors_after_must_fix.title: Centralize error handling and security logging

optimization_opportunities_after_hardeni.title: Streamed upload ingestion and background parsing
Reconciliation/report query tuning and index review
